product: AWS Graviton instances are now supported with the compliance security profile ​
tagline: June 5, 2026 AWS Graviton instance types are now supported with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security profile) for all compliance standards in AWS commercial regions and
what_it_does: June 5, 2026 AWS Graviton instance types are now supported with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security profile) for all compliance standards in AWS commercial regions and Databricks on AWS GovCloud. For the instance types supported by each compliance standard, see [Supported instance types](/aws/en/security/privacy/enhanced security compliance supported instance types).
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
